opts.language.label: Language
opts.language.hint: Select the display language for ComfyGrid.
opts.color_theme.label: Color Theme
opts.color_theme.hint: Select the color theme for ComfyGrid.
opts.show_nsfw.label: Show NSFW Models
opts.save_directory.label: Save Images to Directory
opts.save_directory.hint: Specifies the directory where images will be saved.
opts.create_subdirectory.label: Create Subdirectory
opts.create_subdirectory.hint: Creates a subdirectory when saving images.
opts.subdirectory_name_format.label: Subdirectory Name Format
opts.subdirectory_name_format.hint: Specifies the naming format for subdirectories.
opts.save_image_filename_format.label: Save Image File Name Format
opts.save_image_filename_format.hint: Specifies the filename format for saved images.
opts.node_color.label: Node Color
opts.group_tabify.label: Group Tabify
opts.group_tabify.hint: Specifies the method of group tabification.
opts.group_tabify.choice.tab_groups_only: Tabify only groups whose name starts with '[Tab]'
opts.model_thumbnail_width.label: Model Thumbnail Width
opts.model_thumbnail_width.hint: Specifies the width of model thumbnail images. The aspect ratio is always 3:4.
opts.gallery_image_max_size.label: Gallery Image Max Size
opts.gallery_image_max_size.hint: Specifies the maximum size for gallery images.
opts.save_image_format.label: Save Image Format
opts.save_image_format.hint: Specifies the format when saving images.
opts.save_image_quality.label: Save Image Quality
opts.save_image_quality.hint: Compression quality for lossy formats (WebP, JPEG). 1-100, higher is better quality.
opts.save_image_embed_metadata.label: Embed Metadata in Saved Images
opts.save_image_embed_metadata.hint: Embeds ComfyUI workflow and prompt data into saved images.
opts.system_monitor.label: System Monitor
